hooks.command: $j = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; if ($j.tool_input.command -match 'git\s+(commit|add)\b') { if (Test-Path 'src/backend/.env.example') { $c = Get-Content 'src/backend/.env.example' -Raw; if ($c -match 'sk-ant-api[0-9]+') { @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'PreToolUse'; permissionDecision = 'deny'; permissionDecisionReason = 'BLOCKED: src/backend/.env.example contains a real Anthropic API key (sk-ant-...). Restore the placeholder before committing; move the real key to .env (gitignored).' } } | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 5 -Compress } } }
